token.title: Oura Personal Access Token
token.description: Bearer token from Oura Cloud → Personal Access Tokens. Stored in the OS keychain, never in the workspace. Set it with `outl plugin secret set run.avelino.ouraring token`.

pagePrefix.title: Page prefix
pagePrefix.description: Daily Oura pages are written to `<prefix>-YYYY-MM-DD` (e.g. pages/ouraring-2025-11-29.md).

daysToSync.title: Days to sync
daysToSync.description: How many past days to fetch, including today.
